title: Connect workflow skills and handoffs
summary: Tighten the existing workflow skills so setup, help, review, initiate, and continue connect through explicit handoffs, live registry state, and enforceable JSON validation.
acceptance_criteria: workflow-foundry project state exists and validates
workflow help shows the connected skill path
setup hands off to initiate for new projects and review for existing projects
initiate delegates missing project setup instead of inventing separate scaffold behavior
query helper can print a single project snapshot
validator fails tasks missing required context snapshot load paths

context_snapshot.summary: Load the workflow-foundry project plus root workflow surfaces before resuming this task.

session_log.event: Created initial workflow-foundry task at intake to track connection of the repo-local workflow skill system.
Updated snapshot to include workflow-foundry-002 after adding tracker-maintenance task support.
Updated snapshot to include workflow-foundry-003 after adding Codex app slash prompt shims.
Updated linked artifacts to include .agents/skills discoverable skill entrypoints.
Updated snapshot to include workflow-foundry-004 after adding tracker-maintenance task for tracker upkeep.
Migrated connected flow tracking to skills-only invocation and removed obsolete command/prompt surface artifacts.
Updated snapshot to include workflow-foundry-005 after adding the dark-mode tracker UI intake task.
Updated snapshot to include workflow-foundry-006 after adding the foundry expansion discovery intake task.

Closed during cleanup after downstream workflow-help, setup/initiate/continue handoffs, query helper, and validation behavior had already been implemented and validated by later workflow-foundry tasks.
